

---
title: "11_persist_cmp"
output: html_document

params:
  # ---- which species to include ----
  do_mammals: true
  do_birds: true
  species_csv: "Data/Clean/species_table.csv"

  # ---- Gompertz curve selector ----
  curve: "q025"                  # one of: "q50", "q16", "q025"
  stop_if_missing_gompertz: true

  # ---- pipeline inputs ----
  # default: use Spatial/Outputs_<curve>/ only
  extra_gs_dirs:
    value: !r character(0)

  # ---- rankmap lookup inputs (Script 10 outputs) ----
  rank_lut_dir: "rank_lut"      # under Spatial/Outputs_<curve>/ana/
  rank_lut_prefix: "lut_stage_" # lut_stage_0001.rds, lut_stage_0002.rds, ...

  # ---- stage metadata for x-axis (% removed) ----
  use_pct_removed: true         # uses ana/stage_meta.csv if present
  ana_subdir: "ana"
  stage_meta_name: "stage_meta.csv"

  # ---- outputs ----
  out_subdir: "persist_cmp"     # under Spatial/Outputs_<curve>/ana/
  overwrite: false

  # ---- plotting ----
  x_axis: "pct_removed"         # "pct_removed" or "stage"
  focus_species: ["Pterocles personatus", "Coua gigas", "Coua cursor"]
---

```{r}
# ============================================================
# 00_checks — ALL setup + preconditions + helpers
# After this chunk, the rest of the script is "do the work".
# ============================================================

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(data.table)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(scales)
  library(cowplot)
})

# -------------------------
# tiny helpers
# -------------------------
assert <- function(ok, msg) if (!isTRUE(ok)) stop(msg, call. = FALSE)
need_file <- function(p, label = p) assert(file.exists(p), paste0("Missing file: ", label, "\nPath: ", p))
need_dir  <- function(p, label = p) assert(dir.exists(p),  paste0("Missing dir: ",  label, "\nPath: ", p))

# scientificName -> stable ID used in pipeline tables
sid <- function(x) {
  x <- trimws(as.character(x))
  x <- gsub("\\s+", "_", x)
  x <- gsub("[/\\\\:<>\"|?*]+", "_", x)
  x <- gsub("[^A-Za-z0-9_]+", "_", x)
  x <- gsub("_+", "_", x)
  x <- gsub("^_|_$", "", x)
  x
}

# parse stage number from filenames like "..._0007...."
stage_from_digits <- function(x) {
  suppressWarnings(as.integer(gsub("[^0-9]+", "", basename(x))))
}

# -------------------------
# params
# -------------------------
curve <- as.character(params$curve)
assert(curve %in% c("q50", "q16", "q025"), "params$curve must be one of: 'q50', 'q16', 'q025'.")

do_mam <- isTRUE(params$do_mammals)
do_brd <- isTRUE(params$do_birds)
assert(do_mam || do_brd, "Both do_mammals and do_birds are FALSE -> nothing to do.")

overwrite <- isTRUE(params$overwrite)

use_pct <- isTRUE(params$use_pct_removed)
x_axis  <- as.character(params$x_axis)
if (!x_axis %in% c("pct_removed", "stage")) x_axis <- "pct_removed"

# -------------------------
# folder contract
# -------------------------
out_curve <- file.path("Spatial", paste0("Outputs_", curve))
need_dir(out_curve, paste0("Spatial/Outputs_", curve))

ana <- file.path(out_curve, as.character(params$ana_subdir))
need_dir(ana, "ana (from Script 8)")

# ---- stage 0 baseline (pre-removal) ----
init_path <- file.path("Spatial", "global_orchestrator_init.rds")
need_file(init_path, "Spatial/global_orchestrator_init.rds (stage 0 lookup source)")

# stage meta (Script 8 output)
stage_meta_csv <- file.path(ana, as.character(params$stage_meta_name))
if (use_pct) need_file(stage_meta_csv, "ana/stage_meta.csv (needed for pct_removed)")

# rankmap LUTs (Script 10 output)
lut_root   <- file.path(ana, as.character(params$rank_lut_dir))
lut_prefix <- as.character(params$rank_lut_prefix)
need_dir(lut_root, "ana/rank_lut (Script 10 output)")

# outputs (this script)
out_root <- file.path(ana, as.character(params$out_subdir))
dir.create(out_root, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
need_dir(out_root, "ana/persist_cmp")

out_pu    <- file.path(out_root, "pu_long.csv")
out_sp    <- file.path(out_root, "sp_long.csv")
out_stage <- file.path(out_root, "stage_sum.csv")
out_fp    <- file.path(out_root, "fp.rds")

# -------------------------
# discover pipeline stages (global_state)
# -------------------------
gs_dirs <- unique(c(out_curve, unlist(params$extra_gs_dirs)))
gs_dirs <- gs_dirs[dir.exists(gs_dirs)]
assert(length(gs_dirs) > 0L, "No valid global_state directories found (out_curve + extra_gs_dirs).")

gs_files <- unlist(lapply(gs_dirs, function(d) {
  list.files(d, pattern = "^global_state_stage_[0-9]{4}\\.rds$", full.names = TRUE)
}), use.names = FALSE)

gs_files <- gs_files[file.exists(gs_files)]
assert(length(gs_files) > 0L, paste0("No global_state_stage_####.rds found in:\n", paste(gs_dirs, collapse = "\n")))

pipe_st <- data.table(path = gs_files, stage = stage_from_digits(gs_files))
pipe_st <- pipe_st[is.finite(stage)]
setorder(pipe_st, stage)

pipe_st <- pipe_st[!duplicated(stage)]
assert(nrow(pipe_st) > 0L, "Parsed zero pipeline stages from global_state files.")

# -------------------------
# discover rankmap LUT stages
# -------------------------
lut_files <- list.files(lut_root, pattern = "\\.rds$", full.names = TRUE)
lut_files <- lut_files[file.exists(lut_files)]
assert(length(lut_files) > 0L, paste0("No LUT .rds files found in: ", lut_root))

rx <- paste0("^", lut_prefix, "([0-9]{4})\\.rds$")
base <- basename(lut_files)
m <- regexec(rx, base)
mm <- regmatches(base, m)
ok <- lengths(mm) == 2L
assert(any(ok), paste0("No LUT filenames matched expected pattern: ", rx))

rank_st <- data.table(path = lut_files[ok], stage = as.integer(vapply(mm[ok], `[[`, character(1), 2)))
rank_st <- rank_st[is.finite(stage)]
setorder(rank_st, stage)
rank_st <- rank_st[!duplicated(stage)]
assert(nrow(rank_st) > 0L, "Parsed zero rankmap stages from LUT filenames.")

# -------------------------
# align stage sets + add stage 0 baseline
# -------------------------
common_stage <- intersect(pipe_st$stage, rank_st$stage)
assert(length(common_stage) > 0L, "No common stages between pipeline (global_state) and rankmap LUTs.")

common_stage <- sort(unique(c(0L, common_stage)))

pipe_st <- pipe_st[stage %in% common_stage & stage != 0L]
rank_st <- rank_st[stage %in% common_stage & stage != 0L]

pipe_st <- rbind(data.table(path = init_path, stage = 0L), pipe_st)
rank_st <- rbind(data.table(path = init_path, stage = 0L), rank_st)

setorder(pipe_st, stage)
setorder(rank_st, stage)

st <- data.table(stage = common_stage)
setorder(st, stage)
st[, stage_order := .I - 1L]

stage_meta <- NULL
if (use_pct) {
  stage_meta <- fread(stage_meta_csv)
  assert(all(c("stage", "pct_removed_end") %in% names(stage_meta)),
         "stage_meta.csv must contain columns: stage, pct_removed_end")
  stage_meta <- stage_meta[is.finite(stage) & is.finite(pct_removed_end)]
  setkey(stage_meta, stage)
  st <- merge(st, stage_meta[, .(stage, pct_removed_end)], by = "stage", all.x = TRUE, sort = FALSE)
  st[stage == 0L, pct_removed_end := 0]
}

if (x_axis == "pct_removed" && use_pct && any(is.finite(st$pct_removed_end))) {
  st[, x := as.numeric(pct_removed_end)]
  xlab <- "Habitat removed (%)"
  xlab_plot <- "Habitat removed (%)"
} else {
  st[, x := as.numeric(stage)]
  xlab <- "Removal stage"
  xlab_plot <- "Removal stage"
}

pipe_st <- merge(pipe_st, st[, .(stage, stage_order, x)], by = "stage", all.x = TRUE, sort = FALSE)
rank_st <- merge(rank_st, st[, .(stage, stage_order, x)], by = "stage", all.x = TRUE, sort = FALSE)

# -------------------------
# read species params (Gompertz + density + threshold)
# -------------------------
need_file(params$species_csv, "species_csv")
sp_path <- as.character(params$species_csv)

a_col <- paste0("alpha_", curve)
b_col <- paste0("beta_",  curve)

hdr <- names(fread(sp_path, nrows = 0))
need_cols <- c("scientificName", "className", "density", "min_pop_size", a_col, b_col)
miss <- setdiff(need_cols, hdr)
assert(length(miss) == 0L, paste0("species_table.csv missing columns: ", paste(miss, collapse = ", ")))

sp0 <- fread(sp_path, select = need_cols)

sp0[, scientificName := trimws(as.character(scientificName))]
sp0[, class_lc := tolower(trimws(as.character(className)))]
sp0 <- sp0[class_lc %in% c("mammalia", "aves")]
sp0 <- sp0[(class_lc == "mammalia" & do_mam) | (class_lc == "aves" & do_brd)]
assert(nrow(sp0) > 0L, "After taxon gating, no species remain.")

sp0[, density     := suppressWarnings(as.numeric(density))]
sp0[, min_pop_km2 := suppressWarnings(as.numeric(min_pop_size))]
sp0[, a_pred      := suppressWarnings(as.numeric(get(a_col)))]
sp0[, b_pred      := suppressWarnings(as.numeric(get(b_col)))]

sp0[, species := sid(scientificName)]
assert(anyDuplicated(sp0$species) == 0L, "Duplicate species IDs after sid(scientificName).")

bad <- which(!is.finite(sp0$density) | sp0$density <= 0 |
             !is.finite(sp0$min_pop_km2) | sp0$min_pop_km2 <= 0 |
             !is.finite(sp0$a_pred) | sp0$a_pred <= 0 |
             !is.finite(sp0$b_pred) | sp0$b_pred <= 0)

if (length(bad)) {
  msg <- paste0("Found ", length(bad), " species with invalid params (density/min_pop/alpha/beta).")
  if (isTRUE(params$stop_if_missing_gompertz)) stop(msg, call. = FALSE)
  warning(msg)
  sp0 <- sp0[-bad]
}
assert(nrow(sp0) > 0L, "No valid species remain after filtering invalid rows.")

par <- sp0[, .(
  scientificName,
  species,
  density,
  a_pred,
  b_pred,
  c_th = min_pop_km2,
  class_lc
)]
setkey(par, species)

# -------------------------
# minimal schema checks (read ONE file from each method)
# -------------------------
gs1 <- readRDS(pipe_st$path[1])
assert(is.list(gs1) && "patch_dt" %in% names(gs1), "Pipeline global_state must contain $patch_dt.")
gs1_dt <- as.data.table(gs1$patch_dt)
assert(all(c("species", "pu_id", "patch_area_km2") %in% names(gs1_dt)),
       "Pipeline patch_dt must contain: species, pu_id, patch_area_km2")
rm(gs1, gs1_dt); gc(FALSE)

lu_path <- rank_st[stage != 0L]$path[1]
lu1 <- as.data.table(readRDS(lu_path))
assert("pu_id" %in% names(lu1), "Rank LUT must contain pu_id.")
assert("patch_area_km2" %in% names(lu1), "Rank LUT must contain patch_area_km2.")
assert(("species" %in% names(lu1)) || ("scientificName" %in% names(lu1)),
       "Rank LUT must contain either species OR scientificName (to derive species).")
rm(lu1); gc(FALSE)

init0 <- readRDS(init_path)
assert(is.list(init0) && "patch_dt" %in% names(init0), "global_orchestrator_init must contain $patch_dt.")
init0_dt <- as.data.table(init0$patch_dt)
assert(all(c("species", "pu_id", "patch_area_km2") %in% names(init0_dt)),
       "init$patch_dt must contain: species, pu_id, patch_area_km2")
rm(init0, init0_dt); gc(FALSE)

cat("\n=== Script 11 (refactor) ===\n")
cat("curve        :", curve, "\n")
cat("species_n    :", nrow(par), "\n")
cat("stages_n     :", nrow(st), "\n")
cat("use_pct      :", use_pct, "\n")
cat("x_axis       :", x_axis, "\n")
cat("out_root     :", out_root, "\n\n")
```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# 00_plot_helpers — plotting theme + shared palette
# ============================================================

theme_persist <- function(base_size = 11) {
  ggplot2::theme_classic(base_size = base_size) +
    ggplot2::theme(
      plot.margin   = ggplot2::margin(8, 8, 8, 8),
      axis.title    = ggplot2::element_text(face = "bold", colour = "grey10"),
      axis.text     = ggplot2::element_text(colour = "grey20"),
      axis.line     = ggplot2::element_line(linewidth = 0.45, colour = "grey20"),
      axis.ticks    = ggplot2::element_line(linewidth = 0.45, colour = "grey20"),
      legend.title  = ggplot2::element_text(face = "bold", colour = "grey10"),
      legend.text   = ggplot2::element_text(colour = "grey20"),
      legend.key    = ggplot2::element_blank(),
      plot.title    = ggplot2::element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5, colour = "grey10"),
      plot.subtitle = ggplot2::element_text(hjust = 0.5, colour = "grey30")
    )
}

col_pipe <- "#0072B2"
col_rank <- "#D55E00"

col_pipe_light <- "#8DB9DB"
col_rank_light <- "#F0B08A"

# Shorter labels work better in a shared legend
method_labels <- c(
  pipe = "Persistence-based",
  rank = "Zonation ABF"
)

method_levels <- unname(method_labels[c("pipe", "rank")])

method_cols <- c(
  "Persistence-based" = col_pipe,
  "Zonation ABF" = col_rank
)

label_method <- function(x) {
  factor(
    unname(method_labels[as.character(x)]),
    levels = method_levels
  )
}

stage_breaks_shared <- function(x) {
  x <- sort(unique(as.numeric(x[is.finite(x)])))
  if (!length(x)) return(x)

  if (x_axis == "pct_removed") {
    br <- c(0, 25, 50, 75, 100)
    br[br >= min(x) - 1e-8 & br <= max(x) + 1e-8]
  } else {
    pretty(x, n = 6)
  }
}

persist_breaks_shared <- seq(0, 1, by = 0.2)
persist_labels_shared <- c("0", "0.2", "0.4", "0.6", "0.8", "1")
```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# Persistence functions (from old Script 11)
# Insert into Script 11 BEFORE compute_method() is called.
# ============================================================

# PU-level persistence probability (vectorized)
# Inputs:
#   area_km2 : PU area (km^2)
#   density  : species density parameter (>0)
#   a_pred   : Gompertz alpha (>0)
#   b_pred   : Gompertz beta  (>0)
#   c_th     : threshold area (km^2)
# Output: numeric vector in [0,1]
pu_persist <- function(area_km2, density, a_pred, b_pred, c_th) {
  A    <- as.numeric(area_km2)
  dens <- as.numeric(density)
  a    <- as.numeric(a_pred)
  b    <- as.numeric(b_pred)
  c    <- as.numeric(c_th)

  delta <- A - c
  out <- numeric(length(A))

  ok <- is.finite(delta) & (delta > 0) &
        is.finite(dens) & dens > 0 &
        is.finite(a) & a > 0 &
        is.finite(b) & b > 0

  out[!ok] <- 0

  if (any(ok)) {
    K <- a[ok] * (dens[ok]^(-b[ok]))
    out[ok] <- exp(- K * (delta[ok]^(-b[ok])))
  }

  # clamp
  out[out < 0] <- 0
  out[out > 1] <- 1
  out
}

# Species-level persistence from PU persistence values
# Aggregates PU persistence as: 1 - prod(1 - P_pu) (numerically stable)
# Input: vector P_pu (may include NA)
# Output: scalar in [0,1]
sp_persist <- function(P_pu) {
  if (!length(P_pu)) return(0)

  P <- as.numeric(P_pu)
  P <- P[is.finite(P)]
  if (!length(P)) return(0)

  P <- pmin(pmax(P, 0), 1)

  # stable computation of 1 - prod(1 - P)
  log_ext <- sum(log1p(-P))
  S <- 1 - exp(log_ext)

  # fallback if numerical issues
  if (!is.finite(S)) S <- ifelse(any(P >= 1), 1, 0)

  min(max(S, 0), 1)
}
```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# 02_compute — compute pu_long + sp_long for one method
# (no validation here; 00_checks already ensured schemas)
# ============================================================

is_init <- function(p) identical(basename(p), "global_orchestrator_init.rds")

load_pipe <- function(gs_path) {
  if (is_init(gs_path)) {
    init <- readRDS(gs_path)
    dt <- as.data.table(init$patch_dt)[, .(species, pu_id, patch_area_km2)]
    dt[, patch_area_km2 := as.numeric(patch_area_km2)]
    return(dt)
  }

  gs <- readRDS(gs_path)
  dt <- as.data.table(gs$patch_dt)[, .(species, pu_id, patch_area_km2)]
  dt[, patch_area_km2 := as.numeric(patch_area_km2)]
  dt
}

load_rank <- function(rds_path) {
  if (is_init(rds_path)) {
    init <- readRDS(rds_path)
    dt <- as.data.table(init$patch_dt)[, .(species, pu_id, patch_area_km2)]
    dt[, patch_area_km2 := as.numeric(patch_area_km2)]
    return(dt)
  }

  dt <- as.data.table(readRDS(rds_path))
  if (!("species" %in% names(dt))) dt[, species := sid(scientificName)]
  dt <- dt[, .(species, pu_id, patch_area_km2)]
  dt[, patch_area_km2 := as.numeric(patch_area_km2)]
  dt
}

compute_method <- function(st_method, method, load_fn, par) {
  pu_list <- vector("list", nrow(st_method))
  sp_list <- vector("list", nrow(st_method))

  for (k in seq_len(nrow(st_method))) {
    s   <- st_method$stage[k]
    so  <- st_method$stage_order[k]
    x   <- st_method$x[k]
    src <- st_method$path[k]

    cat(sprintf("[%s] stage %04d (%d/%d)\n", method, s, k, nrow(st_method)))

    lut <- load_fn(src)

    # PU areas: sum patch areas within each PU
    pu <- lut[, .(pu_area_km2 = sum(patch_area_km2, na.rm = TRUE)), by = .(species, pu_id)]

    # join params for persistence calculation
    pu <- par[pu, on = "species"]

    # PU persistence
    pu[, P_pu := pu_persist(pu_area_km2, density, a_pred, b_pred, c_th)]

    # keep a long PU table (useful for debugging / later plots)
    pu_keep <- pu[, .(
      method = method,
      stage = s,
      stage_order = so,
      x = x,
      scientificName,
      species,
      pu_id,
      pu_area_km2,
      P_pu
    )]

    # species persistence (ensure ALL species exist every stage)
    sp_stage <- pu_keep[, .(sp_persist = sp_persist(P_pu)), by = .(species, scientificName)]
    sp_full  <- merge(par[, .(species, scientificName)], sp_stage,
                      by = c("species", "scientificName"), all.x = TRUE, sort = FALSE)
    sp_full[is.na(sp_persist), sp_persist := 0]

    sp_full[, `:=`(
      method = method,
      stage = s,
      stage_order = so,
      x = x
    )]

    setcolorder(sp_full, c("method", "stage", "stage_order", "x", "scientificName", "species", "sp_persist"))

    pu_list[[k]] <- pu_keep
    sp_list[[k]] <- sp_full

    rm(lut, pu, pu_keep, sp_stage, sp_full); gc(FALSE)
  }

  list(
    pu_long = rbindlist(pu_list, use.names = TRUE, fill = TRUE),
    sp_long = rbindlist(sp_list, use.names = TRUE, fill = TRUE)
  )
}
```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# 03_run_write — run both methods, summarize by stage, write outputs
# ============================================================

if (!overwrite && file.exists(out_pu) && file.exists(out_sp) && file.exists(out_stage) && file.exists(out_fp)) {
  cat("[persist_cmp] outputs exist and overwrite=FALSE -> skipping compute.\n")
  cat("  - ", out_pu, "\n", sep = "")
  cat("  - ", out_sp, "\n", sep = "")
  cat("  - ", out_stage, "\n", sep = "")
  cat("  - ", out_fp, "\n", sep = "")
} else {

  res_pipe <- compute_method(pipe_st, "pipe", load_pipe, par)
  res_rank <- compute_method(rank_st, "rank", load_rank, par)

  pu_long <- rbindlist(list(res_pipe$pu_long, res_rank$pu_long), use.names = TRUE, fill = TRUE)
  sp_long <- rbindlist(list(res_pipe$sp_long, res_rank$sp_long), use.names = TRUE, fill = TRUE)

  # stage summaries (denominator fixed = all included species)
  stage_sum <- sp_long[, .(
    n_species = .N,
    mean_persist = mean(sp_persist),
    median_persist = median(sp_persist),
    frac_gt_05 = mean(sp_persist > 0.5)
  ), by = .(method, stage, stage_order, x)]
  setorder(stage_sum, method, stage_order)

  fwrite(pu_long, out_pu)
  fwrite(sp_long, out_sp)
  fwrite(stage_sum, out_stage)

  fp <- list(
    created_at = Sys.time(),
    curve = curve,
    do_mammals = do_mam,
    do_birds = do_brd,
    species_csv = sp_path,
    stage_meta_csv = if (use_pct) stage_meta_csv else NA_character_,
    gs_dirs = gs_dirs,
    lut_root = lut_root,
    outputs = list(pu_long = out_pu, sp_long = out_sp, stage_sum = out_stage),
    params = as.list(params)
  )
  saveRDS(fp, out_fp)

  cat("\n[persist_cmp] wrote:\n")
  cat("  - ", out_pu, "\n", sep = "")
  cat("  - ", out_sp, "\n", sep = "")
  cat("  - ", out_stage, "\n", sep = "")
  cat("  - ", out_fp, "\n\n", sep = "")

  rm(res_pipe, res_rank); gc(FALSE)
}
```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# 04_plot_mean — panel (a) for combined figure
# ============================================================

if (!exists("stage_sum")) stage_sum <- fread(out_stage)

plot_dt_mean <- copy(stage_sum)[
  ,
  method_lab := label_method(method)
][order(method_lab, stage_order)]

x_breaks_mean <- stage_breaks_shared(plot_dt_mean$x)

p_mean <- ggplot(
  plot_dt_mean,
  aes(x = x, y = mean_persist, color = method_lab)
) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.95, lineend = "round") +
  geom_point(size = 1.8) +
  scale_color_manual(values = method_cols, name = NULL) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = x_breaks_mean,
    labels = label_number(accuracy = 1),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0.01, 0.02))
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 1),
    breaks = persist_breaks_shared,
    labels = persist_labels_shared,
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.01))
  ) +
  labs(
    x = xlab_plot,
    y = "Mean persistence"
  ) +
  theme_persist(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none"
  )

# legend donor
p_mean_leg <- p_mean +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.box = "horizontal",
    legend.box.margin = margin(t = 2)
  ) +
  guides(
    color = guide_legend(
      nrow = 1,
      byrow = TRUE,
      override.aes = list(linewidth = 1.15, shape = 16, size = 3)
    )
  )
```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# 04b_focal_species — single focal species used across panels
# ============================================================

focal_name <- if (!is.null(params$focus_species) && length(params$focus_species) >= 1L) {
  as.character(params$focus_species[[1]])
} else {
  "Pterocles personatus"
}
focal_id <- sid(focal_name)

cat("[persist_cmp] focal species:", focal_name, "\n")
```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# 05_plot_focus_panel — panel (b) for combined figure
# focal species persistence across the removal sequence
# ============================================================

if (!exists("sp_long")) sp_long <- fread(out_sp)

dd_focus <- sp_long[species == focal_id]
if (!nrow(dd_focus)) {
  stop(paste0("Species not found in sp_long: ", focal_name), call. = FALSE)
}

plot_dt_focus <- copy(dd_focus)[
  ,
  method_lab := label_method(method)
][order(method_lab, stage_order)]

x_breaks_focus <- stage_breaks_shared(plot_dt_focus$x)

p_focus <- ggplot(
  plot_dt_focus,
  aes(x = x, y = sp_persist, color = method_lab)
) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.95, lineend = "round") +
  geom_point(size = 1.8) +
  scale_color_manual(values = method_cols, name = NULL) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = x_breaks_focus,
    labels = label_number(accuracy = 1),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0.01, 0.02))
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 1),
    breaks = persist_breaks_shared,
    labels = persist_labels_shared,
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.01))
  ) +
  labs(
    x = xlab_plot,
    y = "Species persistence"
  ) +
  theme_persist(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none"
  )
```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# 06_top10_auc_gap — top 10 species by area between pipe vs rank
# Uses trapezoidal integration of |pipe - rank| across x
# ============================================================

if (!exists("sp_long")) sp_long <- fread(out_sp)

# Keep only the columns needed and reshape so pipe/rank are side by side
auc_dt <- dcast(
  sp_long[, .(species, scientificName, stage, stage_order, x, method, sp_persist)],
  species + scientificName + stage + stage_order + x ~ method,
  value.var = "sp_persist"
)

# Require both methods to be present
auc_dt <- auc_dt[is.finite(pipe) & is.finite(rank)]
setorder(auc_dt, species, stage_order)

# Pointwise absolute gap between trajectories
auc_dt[, gap := abs(pipe - rank)]

# Trapezoidal AUC of the gap for each species
top10_auc_gap <- auc_dt[, {
  if (.N < 2L) {
    .(auc_gap = NA_real_)
  } else {
    dx <- diff(x)
    avg_gap <- (gap[-.N] + gap[-1L]) / 2
    .(auc_gap = sum(dx * avg_gap, na.rm = TRUE))
  }
}, by = .(species, scientificName)]

# Print the 10 species with the largest area between curves
top10_auc_gap <- top10_auc_gap[is.finite(auc_gap)][order(-auc_gap)]
top10_auc_gap[, rank := seq_len(.N)]

print(top10_auc_gap[1:min(10, .N), .(rank, scientificName, species, auc_gap)])
```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# 07_plot_species_total_area — panel (c) for combined figure
# Simplified stacked bars:
# - show only every other stage
# - color segments by current PU persistence probability
# - use DIFFERENT fill scales for the two methods
# - within each bar, larger / more persistent PUs are stacked lower
# - draw all PU segments with the same border symbology
# - add a light outline around each full bar
# ============================================================

if (!exists("pu_long")) pu_long <- fread(out_pu)

dd <- pu_long[
  species == focal_id & method %in% c("pipe", "rank"),
  .(method, stage, stage_order, pu_id, pu_area_km2, P_pu)
]

if (!nrow(dd)) {
  stop(paste0("Species not found in pu_long: ", focal_name), call. = FALSE)
}

# ---- current PU area + persistence by stage ----
dd_sum <- dd[
  ,
  .(
    pu_area_km2 = sum(pu_area_km2, na.rm = TRUE),
    current_P_pu = max(P_pu, na.rm = TRUE)
  ),
  by = .(method, stage, stage_order, pu_id)
]

# only every other stage
plot_stages <- sort(unique(dd_sum$stage[dd_sum$stage %% 2L == 0L]))
if (!length(plot_stages)) plot_stages <- sort(unique(dd_sum$stage))

dd_sum <- dd_sum[stage %in% plot_stages]

# use all PUs observed for this focal species across the sequence
all_pu_ids <- sort(unique(dd$pu_id))

stage_key <- unique(dd_sum[, .(method, stage, stage_order)])
setorder(stage_key, method, stage_order)

grid_dt <- CJ(
  method = unique(dd_sum$method),
  stage  = plot_stages,
  pu_id  = all_pu_ids,
  unique = TRUE
)

grid_dt <- merge(
  grid_dt,
  stage_key,
  by = c("method", "stage"),
  all.x = TRUE,
  sort = FALSE
)

dd_plot <- merge(
  grid_dt,
  dd_sum,
  by = c("method", "stage", "stage_order", "pu_id"),
  all.x = TRUE,
  sort = FALSE
)

dd_plot[is.na(pu_area_km2), pu_area_km2 := 0]
dd_plot[is.na(current_P_pu), current_P_pu := 0]

# bottom of stack = larger and/or more persistent PUs
dd_plot[
  ,
  stack_score := {
    area_max <- max(pu_area_km2, na.rm = TRUE)
    area_std <- if (is.finite(area_max) && area_max > 0) pu_area_km2 / area_max else 0
    0.5 * area_std + 0.5 * current_P_pu
  },
  by = .(method, stage, stage_order)
]

setorder(dd_plot, method, stage_order, -stack_score, -pu_area_km2, -current_P_pu, pu_id)

dd_plot[
  ,
  `:=`(
    ymin = c(0, cumsum(pu_area_km2)[-.N]),
    ymax = cumsum(pu_area_km2)
  ),
  by = .(method, stage, stage_order)
]

stage_show <- dd_plot[order(stage_order), unique(stage)]
dd_plot[, stage_index := match(stage, stage_show)]
dd_plot[, x_plot := stage_index + fifelse(method == "pipe", -0.22, 0.22)]

bar_half_width <- 0.19
dd_plot[, `:=`(
  xmin = x_plot - bar_half_width,
  xmax = x_plot + bar_half_width
)]

bar_outline <- dd_plot[
  pu_area_km2 > 0,
  .(
    xmin = min(xmin),
    xmax = max(xmax),
    ymin = 0,
    ymax = max(ymax)
  ),
  by = .(method, stage, stage_order)
]

y_max <- dd_plot[, max(ymax, na.rm = TRUE)]

# method-specific persistence palettes
pipe_fill_cols <- c(
  "#F2F4F7",
  "#DCE7F0",
  "#BCD4E6",
  "#8FB8D8",
  "#5F99C6",
  "#2E78AF"
)

rank_fill_cols <- c(
  "#FCF3ED",
  "#F8DDCF",
  "#F2C0A6",
  "#EA9A72",
  "#D9723F",
  "#B7561D"
)

pipe_pal <- scales::col_numeric(
  palette = pipe_fill_cols,
  domain = c(0, 1),
  na.color = "#F2F4F7"
)

rank_pal <- scales::col_numeric(
  palette = rank_fill_cols,
  domain = c(0, 1),
  na.color = "#FCF3ED"
)

dd_plot[
  ,
  fill_col := ifelse(
    method == "pipe",
    pipe_pal(current_P_pu),
    rank_pal(current_P_pu)
  )
]

p_area <- ggplot() +
  geom_rect(
    data = dd_plot[pu_area_km2 > 0],
    aes(
      xmin = xmin,
      xmax = xmax,
      ymin = ymin,
      ymax = ymax,
      fill = fill_col
    ),
    color = "white",
    linewidth = 0.22,
    linejoin = "mitre"
  ) +
  geom_rect(
    data = bar_outline,
    aes(
      xmin = xmin,
      xmax = xmax,
      ymin = ymin,
      ymax = ymax
    ),
    fill = NA,
    color = "grey78",
    linewidth = 0.35,
    linejoin = "mitre"
  ) +
  scale_fill_identity() +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = seq_along(stage_show),
    labels = as.character(stage_show),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0.03, 0.03))
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = pretty(c(0, y_max), n = 4),
    labels = label_number(big.mark = ","),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.03))
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, y_max * 1.05), clip = "off") +
  labs(
    x = "Stage",
    y = expression("Total PU area (km"^2*")")
  ) +
  theme_persist(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none"
  )

# ---- legend donor: compact stacked colour bars with shared label below ----
legend_x <- seq(0, 1, length.out = 1024)
pipe_raster <- as.raster(matrix(pipe_pal(legend_x), nrow = 1))
rank_raster <- as.raster(matrix(rank_pal(legend_x), nrow = 1))

p_area_leg <- ggplot() +
  annotation_raster(
    raster = pipe_raster,
    xmin = 0, xmax = 1,
    ymin = 0.61, ymax = 0.73
  ) +
  annotation_raster(
    raster = rank_raster,
    xmin = 0, xmax = 1,
    ymin = 0.45, ymax = 0.57
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 1),
    breaks = persist_breaks_shared,
    labels = persist_labels_shared,
    expand = c(0, 0)
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0.38, 0.77),
    breaks = NULL,
    labels = NULL,
    expand = c(0, 0)
  ) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = NULL,
    caption = "PU persistence probability"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 10.1) +
  theme(
    axis.text.y = element_blank(),
    axis.line.y = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(colour = "grey20"),
    axis.line.x = element_line(linewidth = 0.45, colour = "grey20"),
    axis.ticks.x = element_line(linewidth = 0.45, colour = "grey20"),
    axis.ticks.length.x = grid::unit(2.2, "pt"),
    plot.caption = element_text(
      hjust = 0.5,
      colour = "grey20",
      margin = margin(t = 4)
    ),
    plot.margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0)
  )
```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# 08_plot_species_persist_vs_total_area — panel (d) for combined figure
# Extend each method trajectory to the origin (0, 0)
# ============================================================

if (!exists("pu_long")) pu_long <- fread(out_pu)
if (!exists("sp_long")) sp_long <- fread(out_sp)

area_dt <- pu_long[
  species == focal_id & method %in% c("pipe", "rank"),
  .(total_area_km2 = sum(pu_area_km2, na.rm = TRUE)),
  by = .(method, stage, stage_order)
]

persist_dt <- sp_long[
  species == focal_id & method %in% c("pipe", "rank"),
  .(method, stage, stage_order, sp_persist)
]

plot_dt_area <- merge(
  area_dt,
  persist_dt,
  by = c("method", "stage", "stage_order"),
  all = FALSE,
  sort = FALSE
)

if (!nrow(plot_dt_area)) {
  stop(paste0("Species not found in pu_long/sp_long: ", focal_name), call. = FALSE)
}

plot_dt_area[, method_lab := label_method(method)]

# add an origin row for each method so the line reaches (0, 0)
origin_dt <- unique(plot_dt_area[, .(method)])
origin_dt[, `:=`(
  stage = NA_integer_,
  stage_order = Inf,
  total_area_km2 = 0,
  sp_persist = 0,
  method_lab = label_method(method)
)]

plot_dt_area_path <- rbindlist(
  list(plot_dt_area, origin_dt),
  use.names = TRUE,
  fill = TRUE
)

setorder(plot_dt_area_path, method, total_area_km2, stage_order)
setorder(plot_dt_area, method, total_area_km2, stage_order)

x_max <- max(plot_dt_area$total_area_km2, na.rm = TRUE)

p_area_persist <- ggplot() +
  geom_path(
    data = plot_dt_area_path,
    aes(x = total_area_km2, y = sp_persist, color = method_lab),
    linewidth = 0.95,
    lineend = "round"
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = plot_dt_area,
    aes(x = total_area_km2, y = sp_persist, color = method_lab),
    size = 1.8
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = method_cols, name = NULL) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c(0, x_max * 1.02),
    breaks = pretty(c(0, x_max), n = 4),
    labels = label_number(big.mark = ","),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.02))
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 1),
    breaks = persist_breaks_shared,
    labels = persist_labels_shared,
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.01))
  ) +
  labs(
    x = expression("Retained PU area (km"^2*")"),
    y = "Species persistence"
  ) +
  theme_persist(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none"
  )
```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# 09_plot_combined_figure — one 4-panel figure
# Legend layout:
#   left  = stacked colour-bar legend
#   right = method legend
# ============================================================

stopifnot(
  exists("p_mean"),
  exists("p_mean_leg"),
  exists("p_focus"),
  exists("p_area"),
  exists("p_area_persist"),
  exists("p_area_leg")
)

legend_methods <- cowplot::get_legend(p_mean_leg)

p_a <- p_mean +
  theme(
    plot.margin = margin(10, 8, 8, 14),
    axis.title.x = element_text(margin = margin(t = 6))
  )

p_b <- p_focus +
  theme(
    plot.margin = margin(10, 5, 8, 14),
    axis.title.x = element_text(margin = margin(t = 6))
  )

p_c <- p_area +
  theme(
    plot.margin = margin(10, 8, 5, 14)
  )

p_d <- p_area_persist +
  theme(
    plot.margin = margin(10, 5, 5, 14)
  )

tag_panel <- function(p, tag, draw_x = 0.055, draw_y = 0.02, draw_w = 0.945, draw_h = 0.945) {
  cowplot::ggdraw() +
    cowplot::draw_plot(p, x = draw_x, y = draw_y, width = draw_w, height = draw_h) +
    cowplot::draw_plot_label(
      tag,
      x = 0.01, y = 0.99,
      hjust = 0, vjust = 1,
      fontface = "bold",
      size = 12.5
    )
}

p_a_tag <- tag_panel(p_a, "(a)")
p_b_tag <- tag_panel(p_b, "(b)")
p_c_tag <- tag_panel(p_c, "(c)")
p_d_tag <- tag_panel(p_d, "(d)")

panel_grid <- cowplot::plot_grid(
  p_a_tag, p_b_tag, p_c_tag, p_d_tag,
  ncol = 2,
  align = "hv",
  axis = "tblr"
)

# -------------------------
# knobs for legend placement
# -------------------------

# move the ENTIRE legend block right/left
legend_shift_right <- 0.13   # increase -> moves both legends right
legend_total_width <- 0.86   # total width used by both legends together

# relative widths of the left and right legend slots
left_leg_rel_width  <- 0.58  # stacked colour-bar legend slot
right_leg_rel_width <- 0.42  # method legend slot

# LEFT legend (stacked colour-bar legend) placement inside its slot
pu_leg_inner_x      <- 0.11  # increase -> moves left legend right within left slot
pu_leg_inner_width  <- 0.52  # increase -> makes left legend wider

# RIGHT legend (method legend) placement inside its slot
method_leg_inner_x     <- 0.07  # increase -> moves right legend right within right slot
method_leg_inner_width <- 0.82  # increase -> makes right legend wider

# -------------------------
# build legend row
# -------------------------

p_area_leg_left <- cowplot::ggdraw() +
  cowplot::draw_plot(
    p_area_leg,
    x = pu_leg_inner_x,
    y = 0.02,
    width = pu_leg_inner_width,
    height = 0.96
  )

legend_methods_right <- cowplot::ggdraw() +
  cowplot::draw_plot(
    legend_methods,
    x = method_leg_inner_x,
    y = 0.00,
    width = method_leg_inner_width,
    height = 1.00
  )

legend_row_raw <- cowplot::plot_grid(
  p_area_leg_left,
  legend_methods_right,
  nrow = 1,
  rel_widths = c(left_leg_rel_width, right_leg_rel_width)
)

legend_row <- cowplot::ggdraw() +
  cowplot::draw_plot(
    legend_row_raw,
    x = legend_shift_right,
    y = 0,
    width = legend_total_width,
    height = 1
  )

fig_cmp_4panel <- cowplot::plot_grid(
  panel_grid,
  legend_row,
  ncol = 1,
  rel_heights = c(1, 0.14)
)

fig_cmp_4panel
```


```{r}
# Generate a random 4x4 Latin square

set.seed(NULL)  # optional; replace NULL with a number for reproducibility

n <- 4

# Start with a standard cyclic Latin square
L <- outer(0:(n - 1), 0:(n - 1), function(i, j) (i + j) %% n + 1)

# Randomly permute rows, columns, and symbols
L <- L[sample(n), sample(n)]
symbol_perm <- sample(n)
L <- matrix(symbol_perm[L], nrow = n)

print(L)
```
